text.title: Programmatic SEO Patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: 5 antipatterns observed in real programmatic-seo-patterns engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 100k programmatic pages indexed with thin content; Helpful Content update; site authority crashes.
antipattern.fix: Noindex thin tier immediately; resubmit sitemap; recovery takes 3-6 months.

antipattern.symptom: Data source stale 12 months; outdated rankings; user complaints.
antipattern.fix: Refresh source; consider deprecating if source dead.

antipattern.symptom: Comparison template applied to listing intent; CTR <1%.
antipattern.fix: Re-template per intent; A/B verify CTR lift.

antipattern.symptom: Orphan pages (no internal links); 60% never crawled.
antipattern.fix: Build sibling + parent link graph; resubmit sitemap.

antipattern.symptom: Schema.org markup absent; rich results not earned.
